data: {"generalSituation":"The easterly airstream now affecting the coast of Guangdong will moderate tomorrow. Under the influence of an anticyclone aloft, the weather will improve over the coast of southern China in the following couple of days. It will be hot during the day. An active southerly airstream is expected to bring unsettled weather to the coastal areas in the latter part of next week. There will be heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over the region. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Hagupit will move towards the seas east of the Philippines in the next few days.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260510","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"East force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 offshore at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
